title: Minecraft, But The Enchant Level is 1,000,000
description: Use /milenchants to start it. Use /milenchants to stop it. That's it. Enjoy sharpness 1000000.
body:
If the plugin is started, every time you use an enchanting table it will set the output enchant level to 1,000,000. It is very overpowered. Be careful.
Use /milenchants to start it. Use /milenchants to stop it. That's it. Enjoy sharpness 1000000.
